2604.14847.title: TrigReason: Trigger-Based Collaboration between Small and Large Reasoning Models
2604.14847.paper_summary: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) achieve strong performance on complex tasks through extended chains of thought but suffer from high inference latency due to autoregressive reasoning. Recent work explores using Small Reasoning Models (SRMs) to accelerate LRM inference. In this paper, we systematically characterize the capability boundaries of SRMs and identify three common types of reasoning risks: (1) path divergence, where SRMs lack the strategic ability to construct an initial plan, causing reasoning to deviate from the most probable path; (2) cognitive overload, where SRMs fail to solve particularly difficult steps; and (3) recovery inability, where SRMs lack robust self-reflection and error correction mechanisms. To address these challenges, we propose TrigReason, a trigger-based collaborative reasoning framework that replaces continuous polling with selective intervention. TrigReason delegates most reasoning to the SRM and activates LRM intervention only when necessary-during initial strategic planning (strategic priming trigger), upon detecting extraordinary overconfidence (cognitive offload trigger), or when reasoning falls into unproductive loops (intervention request trigger). The evaluation results on AIME24, AIME25, and GPQA-D indicate that TrigReason matches the accuracy of full LRMs and SpecReason, while offloading 1.70x - 4.79x more reasoning steps to SRMs. Under edge-cloud conditions, TrigReason reduces latency by 43.9\% and API cost by 73.3\%. Our code is available at \href{https://github.com/QQQ-yi/TrigReason}{https://github.com/QQQ-yi/TrigReason}
2604.14847.paper_summary_zh: 大型推理模型（LRMs）透過延長的思考鏈在複雜任務上表現出色，但由於自回歸推理，推理延遲較高。最近的研究探索使用小型推理模型（SRMs）來加速LRM推理。在本文中，我們系統性地描述SRMs的能力邊界，並識別出三種常見的推理風險：（1）路徑偏差，SRMs缺乏構建初始計劃的策略能力，導致推理偏離最可能的路徑；（2）認知過載，SRMs未能解決特別困難的步驟；以及（3）恢復無能，SRMs缺乏穩健的自我反思和錯誤修正機制。為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了TrigReason，一個基於觸發的協作推理框架，該框架用選擇性干預取代了持續輪詢。TrigReason將大部分推理委派給SRM，並僅在必要時啟動LRM干預——在初始策略規劃期間（策略啟動觸發）、檢測到異常的過度自信時（認知卸載觸發），或當推理陷入無效循環時（干預請求觸發）。在AIME24、AIME25和GPQA-D上的評估結果表明，TrigReason的準確性與完整的LRMs和SpecReason相匹配，同時將1.70倍至4.79倍的推理步驟卸載給SRMs。在邊緣雲條件下，TrigReason將延遲減少了43.9\%，API成本減少了73.3\%。我們的代碼可在 \href{https://github.com/QQQ-yi/TrigReason}{https://github.com/QQQ-yi/TrigReason} 獲得。
2604.14847.author: Yi Zhao et.al.
2604.14847.authors: Yi Zhao, Yajuan Peng, Cam-Tu Nguyen, Zuchao Li, Xiaoliang Wang, Xiaoming Fu, Hai Zhao
